body_txt: A Sub-Trope of Unusual Eyebrows , this is when a character has no hair follicles that make up their eyebrows. Typically, this is used to give the individual a more brutish, Neanderthal look (although, ironically, Neanderthals are stereotyped to be hairy). Alternatively, they are deliberately used to create an ethereal or alien appearance. In these cases, the brow ridges will tend to be fairly prominent and well-defined, so that the character can still make appropriate facial expressions. Occasionally, however, the artist simply doesn't draw them with eyebrows, and they have to find other ways to emote. Contrast with Big Ol' Eyebrows .
